results.title: Protection of Environment: Clean Air Act Regulations
results.excerpt: Standards for National Ambient Air Quality and permitting requirements for stationary sources under the Clean Air Act.

results.title: Federal Register Vol. 88, No. 239 — EPA Final Rule on PFAS Reporting
results.excerpt: The Environmental Protection Agency promulgates final rule requiring manufacturers to report PFAS data under TSCA section 8(a)(7).

results.title: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (Pub. L. 117-58)
results.excerpt: Authorizes federal funding for broadband infrastructure, roads, bridges, rail, and water systems through fiscal year 2026.
